headline: Teledyne e2v Introduces Perciva™ 5D Camera: Occlusion-free 3D Vision for Industrial, Retail, and Robotic Imaging
summary: GRENOBLE, France, March 05, 2026--Teledyne e2v, a Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) company and global innovator of imaging solutions, announces the launch of the Perciva™ 5D camera, a breakthrough imaging innovation designed to make high‑quality short‑range 3D vision cost-effective, reliable, and easy to integrate.

summary: AXON's Connected Devices sales surge as TASER 10, Axon Body 4 and counter-drone solutions drove strong demand across law enforcement markets.

headline: Teledyne Technologies Deepens Defense Role With New EW And Drone Moves
summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) released a new Wideband Limiter for electronic warfare applications, designed to protect systems from high power RF and directed energy threats. Teledyne FLIR Defense signed a Memorandum of Understanding with STORM Adapt Group to work together on rapidly deployable unmanned aerial systems for defense, security, and emergency response uses. Teledyne Technologies, through its defense focused businesses, is active in sensors, imaging, and electronic systems...
